Term Sheet for Series B Funding

This Term Sheet summarizes the principal terms with respect to the proposed Series B Preferred Stock financing of TechInnovate Pte. Ltd. ("Company"). This document is for discussion purposes only and is not intended to be legally binding.

Issuer: TechInnovate Pte. Ltd.  
UEN: T12LL3456K  

Amount: SGD 8,500,000  

Lead Investor: VentureGrowth Partners  
Contact: Mr. John Tan  
NRIC: S2345678B  
Email: john.tan@venturegrowth.sg  
Phone: +65 6123 4567  

Valuation: Pre-money valuation of SGD 40,000,000  

Closing Date: Expected on or before December 15, 2023  

Ownership: Investors will own 20% of the post-financing Company on a fully diluted basis.  

Please note that this term sheet is subject to the completion of due diligence and the execution of definitive agreements.
